title: L.O.L. Surprise! Tweens - Mermaid Cleo Clove - Fashion Doll with Colour Changing Tail, Movable Fin, and Beautiful Accessories – Toys for Kids Age 4+
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: DISCOVER WHAT’S INSIDE: Get ready to dive into an enchanting world of colour magic and surprises with the L.O.L. Surprise! Tweens Mermaid fashion doll Cleo Cove with dazzling accessories to unbox

COLOUR CHANGING TAIL: Dip your Tweens Mermaid doll into cold water and watch as her tail changes colours from magenta to deep purple, creating a magical underwater experience perfect for bath time and imaginative play
MOVABLE FINS: Cleo Clove brings a splash of excitement with her mesmerizing fin that can move back and forth
UNBOX CUTE ACCESSORIES: Don’t forget to style your doll with her charming accessories including her sea shades, sea shell tiara, and cute pearl belt

ARTICULATED FOR ENDLESS POSES: The doll comes articulated for tons of fabulous posing opportunities, including sitting as she bends at her waist, and standing on her fin to style your doll more easily with greater stability
COLLECT THEM ALL: Collect all 4 glamorous L.O.L. Surprise! Tweens Mermaid fashion dolls: Cleo Clove, Lola Waves, Lana Marine, and Serena Finn for a complete set of endless mermaid fun
